description: Google Closure Library Third-Party Extensions packages optional third-party JavaScript modules used with the Google Closure Library, including Dojo DOM query helpers and MochiKit async utilities. This Maven artifact is a non-official ClojureScript-maintained distribution of those files for consumers that resolve Closure Library dependencies through Maven.

Google Closure Library Third-Party Extensions packages optional third-party modules used with the Google Closure Library, including browser-side utilities such as Caja HTML handling, MochiKit async helpers, lorem ipsum data, SVG pan support, and Dojo DOM query code. This artifact is a ClojureScript-maintained Maven distribution of those JavaScript files for consumers that resolve dependencies through Maven.
